description: Supply-chain hardened installer for Personal Jarvis (cosign + offline Ed25519 + SLSA L3 + ML-DSA-65 + Wave-5 tag-binding + payload-commit pin + content-anchor rename). Scoop distribution makes the package manager's own signing chain the bootstrap-trust root, independent of github.com TLS.
notes: The installer runs a 13-stage classical verifier (Wave 1 cosign + Wave 2 offline Ed25519 + Wave 3 SLSA L3) + Wave 4 ML-DSA-65 + Wave 5 axis E (payload-commit pin) before handing off to the second-stage installer.

Wave 5 fixes from the supply-chain audit: tag-binding cross-check in SAN extraction (no more downgrade-replay), payload-commit pin (cloned tree now bound to a signed commit instead of HEAD-of-main), and content-anchor rename (in-toto overclaim removed).
